title: Central model storage prevents duplicate downloads
user_phrasing: how do I avoid duplicate models
canonical_summary: A central model repository reduces duplicate downloads and keeps multiple AI apps pointed at the same assets.
source_priority_rule: Current local config and app-specific path rules outrank generic folder advice.
answer_pattern: Explain central storage and app mapping.
exactness_guard: Do not assume every tool uses the same folder schema.

title: Model type determines folder destination
canonical_summary: Checkpoints, LoRAs, VAEs, text encoders, controlnets, and upscale models usually belong in different model categories.
source_priority_rule: Tool-specific model path docs outrank memory.
answer_pattern: Explain that file type determines destination.
exactness_guard: Do not place all model files in one generic folder.

title: extra_model_paths maps external folders
canonical_summary: ComfyUI-style path mapping can let a tool reference external model directories without copying every file.
source_priority_rule: Actual config file contents outrank assumed defaults.
exactness_guard: Do not invent a user's exact drive layout.

title: Symlinks and config maps have tradeoffs
canonical_summary: Symlinks, junctions, and config-path mapping can all reduce duplication, but each has maintenance and portability tradeoffs.
source_priority_rule: Local OS and app support determine the safest choice.
answer_pattern: Explain tradeoffs and recommend the least surprising option.
exactness_guard: Do not recommend symlinks without noting maintenance risk.

title: Checkpoint not found
canonical_summary: A checkpoint-not-found error usually means the app cannot see the model file at the expected path.
source_priority_rule: Actual file path and app config drive diagnosis.
answer_pattern: Check whether the file exists and whether the app path points to it.
exactness_guard: Do not redownload before checking path visibility.

title: Wrong model category folder
canonical_summary: If a file exists but does not appear in the UI, it may be in the wrong model-category folder.
answer_pattern: Identify file type and verify correct folder category.
exactness_guard: Do not move files randomly across folders.

title: Duplicate model sprawl
user_phrasing: I downloaded same model multiple times
canonical_summary: Duplicate model sprawl happens when each app maintains separate copies without shared paths or mapping.
source_priority_rule: Disk inventory and path mapping docs drive cleanup.
answer_pattern: Recommend inventory, dedup strategy, and controlled path mapping.
exactness_guard: Do not delete duplicates before confirming which app uses which path.

title: Missing file vs wrong path mapping
user_phrasing: file missing or app can't see it
canonical_summary: If the file is absent, it is a download/asset issue. If present but invisible, it is a mapping/category/config issue.
source_priority_rule: File existence and configured paths drive branch.
answer_pattern: Separate absent assets from invisible assets.
exactness_guard: Do not re-download files that are already present and unmapped.

title: ComfyUI path issue vs multi-app storage design
user_phrasing: is this comfyui path or central library
how do I set model paths for several apps
canonical_summary: If only one app cannot find a file, fix that app's config. If multiple apps duplicate assets, design a central storage strategy.
answer_pattern: Differentiate single-app repair from architecture design.
exactness_guard: Do not over-engineer if only one path entry is wrong.

title: Filesystem and config are source of truth
user_phrasing: where are models actually loaded from
canonical_summary: For local model-folder issues, the actual filesystem, app config, and runtime logs outrank remembered default paths.
answer_pattern: State source order and verify before moving files.
exactness_guard: Do not invent drive letters or delete paths without confirmation.

title: Do not confuse model path with model compatibility
canonical_summary: Path visibility means the app can find the file; compatibility means the app can actually load/use it. These are related but distinct.
source_priority_rule: Error wording determines whether path or compatibility is primary.
exactness_guard: Do not assume a found model is compatible.

title: How to answer model folder questions
user_phrasing: how should assistant answer model path issues
canonical_summary: Answers should identify the file type, check existence, check category folder/config mapping, then recommend a safe dedup or path fix.
answer_pattern: Use: file type -> exists? -> visible? -> correct category? -> map/dedup safely.
exactness_guard: Do not recommend deleting or moving files without inventory.
